name: Grilled Lamb Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the red current jelly and Poupon mustard in a saucepan and simmer on the stovetop for 5 minutes to melt the jelly.
2. Remove the lamb chops from the rack and French cut, being careful not to remove the fat from the eye (the fat will protect the meat from burning on the grill).
3. Allow the sauce to cool completely.
4. Submerge the lamb chops in the sauce and allow to marinade overnight (place in refrigerator).
5. Grill over Hickory coals for 4 to 5 minutes (for medium to medium-rare), basting with sauce as it cooks. Turn once halfway through the cooking time.
6. Prepare garnish sauce by heating shallots in butter, stirring in the white wine and rosemary.
7. Serve lamb with garnish sauce and grilled potatoes and vegetables. The marinade sauce also goes well with other foods including mushrooms.
